observations.polarity: Vision affirmed as real despite physical doubt
observations.summary: Dan asserts the reality of a vision and a star, emphasizing belief in the possible beyond immediate perception, while Father may doubt or not fully accept this vision.

left_evidence.quote: "I'll go," Dan said, and his voice came out steady despite the thickness in his throat.

right_evidence.quote: "But I want you to know—the vision was real. The star was real. You saw it, Father. Even if only for a moment. You saw what's possible."
